meta.trust_note: A suite defines only how canonical bytes and a digest are produced. It carries no trust semantics: recomputing a digest proves content identity, never authorization, execution, or safety.
meta.identifier_note: The digest is encoded in the CAID string as base64url without padding per RFC 4648 section 5, case-sensitive. Unknown suites are a refusal for conforming parsers, never a guess.

suites.notes: Every conforming implementation MUST support jcs-sha256. The action object MUST NOT contain non-integer JSON numbers anywhere (DESIGN.md section 1); this removes the ECMAScript number-serialization divergence class before JCS is applied.

Defined in v1; implementations MAY support it. The reference implementations in this package ship jcs-sha256 only. Cross-suite equivalence is out of scope: a jcs-sha256 CAID and a cbor-sha256 CAID over the same logical content are different identifiers, and an artifact MAY carry one CAID per suite it computed.
